Meet the Expert

Manoj Kumar

AC PCB Repair Specialist · Ajmer, Rajasthan

With over 15 years of hands-on experience, Manoj Kumar has earned a reputation as one of India's most trusted names in AC PCB card repair. His Ajmer workshop is equipped with professional stereo microscopes, precision soldering stations, and digital diagnostic tools — enabling component-level repairs that most technicians simply cannot do.

What started as local AC servicing evolved into a nationwide courier-based PCB repair service, now reaching clients across 20+ Indian states. No call centres. No middlemen. You speak directly to the expert.

🔬RF4 Stereo Microscope + Professional Diagnostic Tools
📦Courier PCB Repair — Accepted from All 28 States
📋Diagnosis Report Shared Before Any Repair Begins
What I Fix & Service

Complete AC Solutions

From advanced PCB board diagnosis to routine maintenance. All brands, all models, delivered across India.

⭐ Flagship Service

AC PCB Card Repair

Specialised component-level diagnosis and repair of AC control boards, inverter boards, and power modules. Any brand, any model. Courier accepted PAN India.

🔧

AC Repair — All Brands

Split, window, cassette — full diagnosis & fix for Samsung, LG, Daikin, Voltas, Blue Star & more.

🏗️

AC Installation

New unit setup with correct bracket, piping, and electrical work. Available for Ajmer region.

💨

Gas Filling (Re-gassing)

Refrigerant top-up using correct gas type for optimal cooling performance and efficiency.

🛠️

Annual Maintenance (AMC)

Scheduled servicing to extend your AC lifespan. Ideal for offices, hotels and societies.

📋

PCB Diagnosis Report

Detailed fault report before repair begins. Full cost transparency — zero surprise charges.

Simple Process

How Courier PCB Repair Works

No need to visit Ajmer. Send your PCB from anywhere in India and get it back — repaired and fully tested.

1
📞

Call or WhatsApp

Describe the fault. Manoj advises whether courier repair is suitable and shares packing tips.

2
📦

Pack & Send PCB

Pack in bubble wrap and courier to Ajmer via India Post, DTDC, or any courier partner.

3
🔬

Diagnosis & Repair

Full component-level inspection. Confirmation call before any paid work begins.

4
🚚

Tested & Returned

PCB tested, professionally packed, and returned via tracked courier to your address.

⏱️ Typical turnaround: 3–7 working days depending on fault complexity. You receive an update call once diagnosis is complete.
